name: Cayman Islands (civil ensign)
description: A British Red Ensign with the Union Flag in the canton, defaced in the fly with the coat of arms of the Cayman Islands — three stars on blue and white wavy lines beneath a green chief and a turtle crest.
history: The civil ensign of the Cayman Islands is the Red Ensign defaced with the territorial coat of arms.

features.role: Coat of arms of the Cayman Islands
